title: Hotspot
overview: You log into a social network everyday. You upload information about yourself. You alter some details about yourself. You make yourself seem more exciting. And then you change more and more details. You chat to people. You say things you wouldn’t say face to face. It’s not you. You have just created someone else. In a near future, Jeremy, a genius scientist, is developing Hotspot, a new type of social network that will change people’s lives.
